title: Engaged!
excerpt: We don't really take the traditional route when it comes to doing the big life things. But that's just another reason why I love us. #engaged Thank you so much for all your well wishes. I posted this photo on…
body: Thank you so much for all your well wishes. I posted this photo on Instagram and I've just been smiling ear to ear reading all of your heartfelt comments on IG + Facebook. And yes, this was the secret I have been holding onto for a while that I referred to in my last currents list. Part of the reason it took a while to share is that I was making sure we told all the family and friends that we could beforehand. And I also agonized over how I wanted to share the news. I thought of a few great ideas, but it would take a lot of effort and a pretty intricate photo shoot that perhaps we would never actually get to. A few of you were even perceptive enough to see it and point it out in the Happy Mail video. In any case, I am so happy to finally share this fun news. We aren't setting a date anytime soon and are just going to enjoy being engaged for a little bit. Once again, I so appreciate your "likes" and words. Thank you thank you!
